div.span: 您正在以访客身份使用翻译功能。登录后可下载翻译文件并保存历史记录。

div.p: Create a new translation above to get started.

div.class: llm-translate-toolbar p-2 border-bottom bg-view d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap

button.t-att-title: state.translationDisplayMode === 'split' ? 'Switch to bilingual single-pane view' : 'Switch to split-pane view'

button.title: 互换源语言和目标语言

i.class: fa fa-exclamation-triangle fa-3x mb-3 d-block text-danger

div.p: Please fix the issue and re-upload the file.

div.t-att-style: 'transform: scale(' + state.zoomLevel + '); transform-origin: top center; min-width: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%; min-height: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%;'

tr.t-att-class: {'llm-table-row-pending': !getParaTranslatedText(trow) and trow.state !== 'translating' and trow.state !== 'error', 'llm-table-row-translating': trow.state === 'translating', 'llm-table-row-error': trow.state === 'error'}

{'llm-table-row-pending': !getParaTranslatedText(trow) and trow.state !== 'translating' and trow.state !== 'error', 'llm-table-row-translating': trow.state === 'translating', 'llm-table-row-error': trow.state === 'error'}

span.style: position: relative; display: inline-block; overflow: hidden;

div.t-att-style: 'transform: scale(' + state.zoomLevel + '); transform-origin: top left; min-width: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%; min-height: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%;'
'transform: scale(' + state.zoomLevel + '); transform-origin: top left; min-width: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%; min-height: ' + (100 * state.zoomLevel) + '%;'

tr.t-att-class: {'llm-table-row-pending': !getParaTranslatedText(trow) and trow.state !== 'translating' and trow.state !== 'error', 'llm-table-row-translating': trow.state === 'translating', 'llm-table-row-error': trow.state === 'error'}

div.style: position: relative; display: inline-block; overflow: hidden;

div.title: 拖拽调整文本框大小（字体不变）

t.div:
未检测到文字
点击右上角刷新按钮重新翻译，或检查源语言设置

div.small: Edit translations to auto-learn, or add entries manually above.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-info p-0 me-1
button.title: View full context

div.class: llm-glossary-panel-footer border-top p-2 bg-light d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
div.small: Entries are auto-learned when you edit translations.

div.label: Submit interval
div.div: Time to wait between translation batch submissions. Use 0 for no delay.
勾选后表格译文显示为下一行；取消勾选后译文直接跟随在原文后面。

t.span: No reasoning available for this paragraph.

div.p:
您当前以访客身份使用翻译功能。
登录或注册后即可下载翻译完成的文件。
